title: ya'al #2973
definition:
1) to be foolish, become fools, act foolishly, show wicked folly
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to show wicked folly
        1a2) to become fools
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be foolish, become fools, act foolishly, show wicked folly
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to show wicked folly
        1a2) to become fools

    NASB:  to be foolish
